testcase.name: test_dirty_and_staged_paths_are_only_feature_060b_paths

failure.message: AssertionError: True is not false : forbidden path present: src/environment/environment.py

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.integration.test_bind_full_campaign_real_torch_trainer_scope_guard.BindFullCampaignRealTorchTrainerScopeGuardTests testMethod=test_dirty_and_staged_paths_are_only_feature_060b_paths>
def test_dirty_and_staged_paths_are_only_feature_060b_paths(self) -> None: status_output = subprocess.run(["git", "status", "--short"], check=True, capture_output=True, text=True).stdout.splitlines() cached_output = subprocess.run(["git", "diff", "--cached", "--name-only"], check=True, capture_output=True, text=True).stdout.splitlines() paths = [line[3:].strip() for line in status_output] + [line.strip() for line in cached_output] forbidden = (".specify/feature.json", "AGENTS.md", ".gitignore", "src/environment/", "src/policies/", "pyproject.toml", "poetry.lock", "uv.lock") ignored = ( ".claude-flow/daemon-state.json", ".claude-flow/daemon.pid", "data/memory/memory.db", "data/memory/memory.db-shm", "data/memory/memory.db-wal", "ruvector.db", "SUMMARY.md", ) for path in paths: > self.assertFalse(any(path.startswith(prefix) for prefix in forbidden), msg=f"forbidden path present: {path}") E AssertionError: True is not false : forbidden path present: src/environment/environment.py
tests/integration/test_bind_full_campaign_real_torch_trainer_scope_guard.py:23: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_final_diff_stays_within_allowed_paths

failure.message: AssertionError: True is not false : Forbidden path touched: agentdb.rvf.lock

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.integration.test_controlled_mechanistic_sweeps_final_diff.ControlledMechanisticSweepsFinalDiffTests testMethod=test_final_diff_stays_within_allowed_paths>
def test_final_diff_stays_within_allowed_paths(self) -> None: diff = subprocess.run( ["git", "diff", "--name-only", "HEAD"], check=True, capture_output=True, text=True, ).stdout.splitlines() untracked = subprocess.run( ["git", "ls-files", "--others", "--exclude-standard"], check=True, capture_output=True, text=True, ).stdout.splitlines() changed_paths = [Path(item) for item in diff + untracked] forbidden_tokens = ( "src/environment/", "src/policies/", "src/training/", "src/metrics/", "campaign/", ".tf", ".lock", "plot", ) for path in changed_paths: > self.assertFalse( any(token in path.as_posix() for token in forbidden_tokens), msg=f"Forbidden path touched: {path}", ) E AssertionError: True is not false : Forbidden path touched: agentdb.rvf.lock
tests/integration/test_controlled_mechanistic_sweeps_final_diff.py:34: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_git_diff_does_not_touch_forbidden_paths

failure.message: AssertionError: True is not false : Forbidden path touched: src/environment/environment.py

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.integration.test_controlled_mechanistic_sweeps_scope_guard.ControlledMechanisticSweepsScopeGuardTests testMethod=test_git_diff_does_not_touch_forbidden_paths>
def test_git_diff_does_not_touch_forbidden_paths(self) -> None: import subprocess
diff = subprocess.run( ["git", "diff", "--name-only", "HEAD"], check=True, capture_output=True, text=True, ).stdout.splitlines() untracked = subprocess.run( ["git", "ls-files", "--others", "--exclude-standard"], check=True, capture_output=True, text=True, ).stdout.splitlines()
changed_paths = [Path(item) for item in diff + untracked] forbidden_prefixes = ( Path("src/environment"), Path("src/policies"), Path("src/training"), Path("src/metrics"), Path("campaign"), Path("dependencies"), Path("lockfiles"), ) for path in changed_paths: > self.assertFalse( any(path.as_posix().startswith(prefix.as_posix()) for prefix in forbidden_prefixes), msg=f"Forbidden path touched: {path}", ) E AssertionError: True is not false : Forbidden path touched: src/environment/environment.py
tests/integration/test_controlled_mechanistic_sweeps_scope_guard.py:72: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_no_forbidden_paths_changed

failure.message: AssertionError: True is not false : forbidden path changed: src/policies/policy_interface.py

testcase.name: test_no_forbidden_paths_changed

failure.message: AssertionError: True is not false : forbidden path changed: src/policies/policy_interface.py

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.integration.test_execution_time_contract_scope_guard.ExecutionTimeContractScopeGuardIntegrationTest testMethod=test_no_forbidden_paths_changed>
def test_no_forbidden_paths_changed(self) -> None: changed_paths = self._changed_paths() for path in changed_paths: normalized = Path(path).as_posix() > self.assertFalse( any(normalized.startswith(prefix) for prefix in FORBIDDEN_PREFIXES), msg=f"forbidden path changed: {normalized}", ) E AssertionError: True is not false : forbidden path changed: src/policies/policy_interface.py
tests/integration/test_execution_time_contract_scope_guard.py:46: AssertionError
